div.p: Browse verified specialists and book an appointment online

input.name: search
input.placeholder: Search by name, specialization or city...

p.t: No doctors found matching your criteria.

div.p: Try adjusting your search or view all doctors.
Join MedConnect and reach thousands of patients looking for your expertise.

t.t-out: '%02d:%02d %s' % (fh if fh <= 12 else fh - 12, fm, 'AM' if fh < 12 else 'PM')
'%02d:%02d %s' % (th if th <= 12 else th - 12, tm, 'AM' if th < 12 else 'PM')

div.p: Join MedConnect. Fill in your details and our team will verify your profile.

textarea.name: bio
textarea.placeholder: Brief description of your expertise, approach, areas of focus...

div.label: I have read and accept the compliance requirements *

div.p: By submitting, you agree to our verification process. Your profile will be reviewed within 24–48 hours.
Thank you for registering with MedConnect. Your application is under review.
Our team will verify your details within 24–48 hours. You will receive an email once your profile is approved.
